note: Canonical reproit oracle categories. Every finding emitted by the reproit CLI carries an `oracle` field whose value is exactly one of these ids. This file is the cross-repo contract: downstream consumers (reproit-cloud) MUST (1) handle every id listed here and (2) degrade gracefully on an id they do not recognize (never drop a finding). It is the single source of truth, kept in lockstep with the Rust `Oracle` enum by a drift test (crates/reproit/src/crosscut.rs::oracle_registry_matches_all). When this list grows, the reproit CLI is not blocked; instead the CLOUD side must fail its own CI (P0) until it adds handling for the new id. See the cloud-side consumer test described in that drift test's comment.
